summary: Deliverable non-functional: missing test files (bun test will fail), fixture JSONs (workflow matrix refs fixtures/test-case-*.json L23-25), label-rules.json (index.ts L8 import), and package.json. Workflow repeats Bun install 3× (lines 13-14, 28-29, 41-42)—should use composite action. No TDD evidence. Test assertions brittle—tight coupling to output format (run-act-tests.ts ~L100-138). Core logic sound but incomplete.
